title: STATIC BLOOM
subtitle: D'Ambrosio's · 7:42 PM · Friday Dinner
epigraph_upright: Friday dinner. The 7 PM seatings are settling. Table 12 has the imperious wave already rehearsed. Sammy at the well. Hector at the line. Dante at the helm. You feel the third kick low and insistent during the second water round. Aria has not, this evening, said anything. The boat is the boat.
epigraph_reversed: Aria asks a question at 9:14. You do not, tonight, answer. The static behind your eyes bloomed.
scene_description: 7:42 PM. Friday dinner service. The dining room is at 60% capacity rising. Bloom at 1 (you have been on the floor for an hour and a half). Doubt at 1. Harvest at 1. The interior visitors (Aria, the Third) are present but not yet active. The third kick this hour is in the gravity deck.
direction_hint: Greet the table 12 party. Seat the private dining six-top. Pour water for the table. Smooth the apron between seatings. Bloom to 4. Leap.
opening_log_lines: 7:42 PM. The 7 PM seatings are at amuse bouche.
Sammy at the well. Hector at the line. Dante in the helm window.
The third kicked once during the second water round. Low. Insistent.

stagnation_thresholds.label: table 7 has been waiting on water for too long.
the bus kid dropped a tray. the floor heard.
the night did not, this friday, hold.

doubt_thresholds.label: nicola at the stand. the apron is straight. the smile is the smile.
the third kicked. you smoothed the apron without thinking.
aria asked a question. you have not, today, answered.
the static behind your eyes bloomed.

notes: Easy-mode Empress. The canonical Friday-night ch3 setup. Aria activates at turn 3 (the first question lands). The Third is in the gravity deck via the_first_kick_this_hour. Dean is NOT present in this scenario — that's S2. Win is 3 connections + Bloom 4 + leap. The SIDE DOOR threshold is hidden by default (Dean has not, today, used it).
ambient_pool: the bell above the front door · the imperious wave from table 12 · the heat lamp at the pass.
from the helm window, dante's shape behind the glass.
aria has not, this turn, asked anything.
